# 03.07-delete-legacy: Delete legacy ASP.NET Framework files

# 03.07 - Delete legacy files

## Objective
Delete all files that have no equivalent in ASP.NET Core.

## Files to delete
- Global.asax, Global.asax.cs
- Web.config, Web.Debug.config, Web.Release.config
- Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs (SDK auto-generates)

**Done when**: All legacy files deleted; project still compiles.
